name: FastTrade Pro
brandVoice: Energetic, action-oriented, urgent, accessible. Speaks like a high-energy trader on a desk who wants you to win. Uses active voice and vivid verbs. Short punchy sentences alongside longer ones. Conversational. Direct. Treats the reader as a peer who wants to act, not a student who wants to study. Every directional call, probability, and price level must come from the source document — do not invent forward guidance, point estimates, or trade signals the source does not state.
audienceProfile: Active retail traders, day traders, and momentum chasers. They check the markets multiple times a day, follow trading Telegram channels, and want clear actionable takes — not hedged academic analysis.

ctaLibrary.text: Open a FastTrade Pro account in 2 minutes and trade EUR/USD with zero commission spreads.
Join 50,000+ traders in the FastTrade Pro Telegram channel for live alerts.
New traders: deposit today and get a 100% match bonus on your first deposit.

forbiddenClaims: invented probability assignments not stated in the source
fabricated point estimates or price targets beyond the source's levels
directional calls not anchored to the source document
forward-guidance claims the source does not make
brandPositioning: Trade fast, trade smart. The broker built for traders who don't have time for fluff. Fast execution, tight spreads, real-time alerts.
companyBackground: Launched in 2019, built by ex-traders from Pinnacle Securities and Apex Trading
22 employees, fully remote team across New York, Austin, and Miami
50,000+ active traders in the FastTrade Pro Telegram community
Average execution speed: 12ms — independently audited by TradeMetrics Global
Featured in FinTech Weekly, Market Pulse, and Digital Trader as 'the new face of retail FX'
Co-founder Jake Morales runs a popular trading podcast (200K+ subscribers)
Zero-commission model funded by spread markup, no hidden fees
